incidentSummary: Order creation requests intermittently returned 504 due to downstream payment call exceeding configured client timeout.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: payments-service delay exceeded orders-service RestTemplate read timeout
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Orders emitted timeout exception, downstream span duration matched timeout threshold, and latency metrics spiked for /api/orders 504 responses.

performanceFindings: orders-service p95 latency rose above 3s during incident window.
recommendedActions: Verify failure-simulation.payments.delay-ms is disabled in non-test environments.
Align RestTemplate timeout with SLO and add circuit-breaker fallback for payment calls.
